generated_exposure.exposure_text: As a veteran, I've seen firsthand how underfunding our military puts our nation at risk. The recent cuts have left our troops with outdated equipment and stretched thin resources. We can't afford to wait for a crisis to act. It's our duty to ensure our military has what it needs to keep us safe. #SupportOurTroops #NationalSecurityFirst
